data.biography: 陆思宇，男，汉族，1987年1月31日出生于天津，毕业于北京电影学院05级表演本科班，中国大陆演员。
data.name: 陆思宇

data.biography: 陸思宇，男，漢族，1987 年 1 月 31 日出生於天津，畢業於北京電影學院 05 級表演本科班，中國大陸演員。
data.name: 陸思宇

data.overview: Ở tuổi 40, diễn viên đóng thế Woo-seok luôn khao khát được quay trở lại thời kỳ đỉnh cao năm 1997, trước khi vết sẹo trên mặt chấm dứt giấc mơ diễn xuất của anh. Một ngày nọ, anh mua năm lá bùa từ một nhà sư vô danh với hy vọng thay đổi cuộc đời. Thế nhưng trong một buổi quay phim, một tai nạn xe hơi đã đưa anh trở về năm 1997, thời trung học của mình. Giờ đây, sống lại trong thân xác cậu học sinh năm xưa, Woo-seok bắt tay vào “cải tạo” quá khứ đầy sai lầm của mình, với tư cách một người con, người chồng và người cha từng khiến gia đình khổ sở.
data.title: Trở Về Năm 1997

data.name: King of Collectibles: The Goldin Touch
data.original_name: King of Collectibles: The Goldin Touch

data.biography:
Kanjeng Raden Tumenggung Irwan Susetyo Pakusadewo, better known by the stage name Tio Pakusadewo (born 2 September 1963), is an Indonesian actor. He has won two Citra Awards for Best Leading Actor at the Indonesian Film Festival, for Lagu untuk Seruni (1990) and Identitas (2008).

Tio was born on 2 September 1963 in Jakarta. He showed interest in the arts at an early age, taking up dance while in elementary school. In senior high he was active with the school's theatre troupe, and after graduating in 1985 Tio enrolled in the Jakarta Art Institute. On the side he worked as a model, and in 1987 he made his feature film debut playing opposite Rano Karno in Bilur-Bilur Penyesalan (Stripes of Regret), an adaptation of the novel by Mira W.

In 1988 Tio took four roles, including one in Catatan Si Boy II (Boy's Diary II), which gave him national recognition. His fame was cemented through his role in Garin Nugroho's Cinta Dalam Sepotong Roti (Love in a Slice of Bread; 1990), which won the Citra Award for Best Film at the 1991 Indonesian Film Festival. Also in 1991, Tio received his first Citra Award for acting, for his role as an eccentric composer in Lagu Untuk Seruni.

During the early 1990s the domestic film industry faced a steep decline, and Tio began to focus on soap operas. In 1993 he established his own production hous, Kalbuku, which produced several serials, including Desy (1994), Lakon Tiga Duda (Story of Three Widowers; 1994), Anak-Anak Menteng (Children of Menteng; 1996), Telaga Kesabaran (Lake of Patience; 1996), and Tirai Sutra (Silk Curtains; 1996).[3] The company, although initially highly successful, soon faced financial problems and closed; Tio also began facing a drug addiction. His last feature film role of the millennium was in Kuldesak (Dead End), an indie film co-directed by Mira Lesmana, Riza Mantovani, Riri Riza and Nan Triveni. The film was released in 1999.

Tio would not reenter the film industry until 2004, when he portrayed a "sugar daddy" in Hanny Saputra's film Virgin. His next film role, in Nia Dinata's Berbagi Suami (Love for Share; 2006), was as a polygamist who fears his four wives. Since 2007, Tio has appeared in at least two films every year. These span a variety of genres, including the horror film Legenda Sundel Bolong (Legend of Sundel Bolong; 2007), comedy Quickie Express (2007), drama Sang Penari (The Dancer; 2011), and thriller Pintu Terlarang (The Forbidden Door; 2009).

In 2010 Tio was granted the title Kanjeng Raden Tumenggung from the royal court at Sultanate of Yogyakarta; from which he is descended. That year he also established an acting school in Kemang, South Jakarta, because he considered the quality of most new Indonesian actors and actresses to be poor. The school teaches a method of acting developed by Tio himself.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia
data.name: Tio Pakusadewo

data.biography: Tio Pakusadewo mulai dikenal oleh publik Indonesia setelah berperan dalam film layar lebar Cinta Dalam Sepotong Roti arahan Garin Nugroho pada tahun 1990, Pada awal tahun 1990-an, tokoh yang masih terhitung kerabat Kadipaten Pakualaman ini dikenal sebagai bintang film muda yang penuh talenta. Berkat perannya sebagai Aria, seorang komponis idealis dalam film Lagu Untuk Seruni (1991), ia meraih Piala Citra di Festival Film Indonesia 1991 untuk kategori Aktor Terbaik. Namun bersamaan dengan tenggelamnya film Indonesia pada pertengahan 1990-an, Tio menghilang. Ia terjebak dalam masalah pribadi dan narkoba. Ia kembali berkarier di dunia perfilman dengan berperan pada film Virgin (2004). Kemudian banyak judul film yang kembali ia bintangi seperti Berbagi Suami (2006), Quickie Express (2007), Lastri (2008), Pintu Terlarang (2009). Pada tahun 2009 ia kembali meraih Piala Citra kategori Aktor Terbaik di Festival Film Indonesia 2009 lewat film Identitas (film) arahan sutradara Aria Kusumadewa.
data.name: Tio Pakusadewo

data.biography:
（生于 1963 年 9 月 2 日），是一位印度尼西亚演员。他曾在印度尼西亚电影节上两次获得Citra奖最佳男主角奖，分别是《Lagu untuk Seruni》（1990年）和《Identitas》（2008年）。

Tio 于 1963 年 9 月 2 日出生于雅加达。他从小就对艺术表现出兴趣，在小学时就开始学习舞蹈。高中时，他活跃于学校的剧团，1985年毕业后，他就读于雅加达艺术学院。1987年，他首次执导长片，在改编自米拉·W小说的《遗憾的条纹》（Bilur-Bilur Penyesalan）中与拉诺·卡尔诺（Rano Karno）演对手戏。

1988 年，Tio 扮演了四个角色，其中包括 Catatan Si Boy II（男孩日记 II）中的一个角色，这使他获得了全国认可。1990年，他在加林·努格罗霍（Garin Nugroho）执导的《一片面包中的爱情》（Cinta Dalam Sepotong Roti）中扮演角色，该片获得了1991年印度尼西亚电影节的Citra最佳影片奖。同样在 1991 年，Tio 因在 Lagu Untuk Seruni 中扮演古怪的作曲家而获得了他的第一个 Citra 表演奖。

在1990年代初期，国内电影业面临急剧下滑，Tio开始专注于肥皂剧。1993年，他成立了自己的制作公司Kalbuku，制作了几部连续剧，包括《Desy》（1994年）、《Lakon Tiga Duda》（《三个鳏夫的故事》，1994年）、《Anak-Anak Menteng》（《Menteng的孩子》，1996年）、Telaga Kesabaran（《耐心之湖》，1996年）和《Tirai Sutra》（《丝绸窗帘》，1996年）。[3]该公司虽然最初非常成功，但很快就面临财务问题并关闭;蒂奥也开始面临毒瘾。他在千禧年的最后一个故事片角色是在 Kuldesak （Dead End） 中，这是一部由 Mira Lesmana、Riza Mantovani、Riri Riza 和 Nan Triveni 联合执导的独立电影。这部电影于1999年上映。

蒂奥直到 2004 年才重新进入电影业，当时他在汉尼·萨普特拉的电影《处女》中饰演了一个“干爹”。2006年，他在妮娅·迪纳塔（Nia Dinata）执导的《分享的爱》（Berbagi Suami）中扮演了一个一夫多妻制者，他害怕自己的四个妻子。自2007年以来，蒂奥每年至少出演两部电影。这些作品涵盖了多种类型，包括恐怖片《桑德尔·博龙传奇》（2007年）、喜剧片《快车》（2007年）、剧情片《舞者》（2011年）和惊悚片《禁门》（2009年）。

2010 年，Tio 被日惹苏丹国的皇家法院授予 Kanjeng Raden Tumenggung 头衔;他是他的后裔。同年，他还在雅加达南部的克芒建立了一所表演学校，因为他认为大多数印尼新演员的素质都很差。学校教授蒂奥自己开发的表演方法。
data.name: 蒂奥·帕库苏德沃

data.biography:
（生於 1963 年 9 月 2 日），是一位印度尼西亞演員。他曾在印度尼西亞電影節上兩次獲得 Citra 獎最佳男主角獎，分別是《Lagu untuk Seruni》（1990 年）和《Identitas》（2008 年）。

Tio 於 1963 年 9 月 2 日出生於雅加達。他從小就對藝術表現出興趣，在小學時就開始學習舞蹈。高中時，他活躍於學校的劇團，1985 年畢業後，他就讀於雅加達藝術學院。1987 年，他首次執導長片，在改編自米拉·W 小説的《遺憾的條紋》（Bilur - Bilur Penyesalan）中與拉諾·卡爾諾（Rano Karno）演對手戲。

1988 年，Tio 扮演了四個角色，其中包括 Catatan Si Boy II（男孩日記 II）中的一個角色，這使他獲得了全國認可。1990 年，他在加林·努格羅霍（Garin Nugroho）執導的《一片面包中的愛情》（Cinta Dalam Sepotong Roti）中扮演角色，該片獲得了 1991 年印度尼西亞電影節的 Citra 最佳影片獎。同樣在 1991 年，Tio 因在 Lagu Untuk Seruni 中扮演古怪的作曲家而獲得了他的第一個 Citra 表演獎。

在 1990 年代初期，國內電影業面臨急劇下滑，Tio 開始專注於肥皂劇。1993 年，他成立了自己的製作公司 Kalbuku，製作了幾部聯續劇，包括《Desy》（1994 年）、《Lakon Tiga Duda》（《三個鰥夫的故事》，1994 年）、《Anak - Anak Menteng》（《Menteng 的孩子》，1996 年）、Telaga Kesabaran（《耐心之湖》，1996 年）和《Tirai Sutra》（《絲綢窗簾》，1996 年）。該公司雖然最初非常成功，但很快就面臨財務問題並關閉; 蒂奧也開始面臨毒癮。他在千禧年的最後一個故事片角色是在 Kuldesak （Dead End） 中，這是一部由 Mira Lesmana、Riza Mantovani、Riri Riza 和 Nan Triveni 聯合執導的獨立電影。這部電影於 1999 年上映。

蒂奧直到 2004 年才重新進入電影業，當時他在漢尼·薩普特拉的電影《處女》中飾演了一個“乾爹”。2006 年，他在妮婭·迪納塔（Nia Dinata）執導的《分享的愛》（Berbagi Suami）中扮演了一個一夫多妻制者，他害怕自己的四個妻子。自 2007 年以來，蒂奧每年至少出演兩部電影。這些作品涵蓋了多種類型，包括恐怖片《桑德爾·博龍傳奇》（2007 年）、喜劇片《快車》（2007 年）、劇情片《舞者》（2011 年）和驚悚片《禁門》（2009 年）。

2010 年，Tio 被日惹蘇丹國的皇家法院授豫 Kanjeng Raden Tumenggung 頭銜; 他是他的後裔。同年，他還在雅加達南部的克芒建立了一所表演學校，因為他認為大多數印尼新演員的素質都很差。學校教授蒂奧自己開發的表演方法。
data.name: 蒂奧·帕庫蘇德沃

data.biography: Temuera Derek Morrison (born December 26, 1960) is a New Zealand actor. He has become one of the country's most famous stars for his roles as the abusive Jake "the Muss" Heke in 1994's Once Were Warriors and as bounty hunter Jango Fett and the Clone Troopers in the Star Wars series. He also voiced Boba Fett in the 2004 special edition of Star Wars Episode V: The Empire Strikes Back.
data.name: Temuera Morrison

data.biography: Temuera Derek Morrison (26 de diciembre de 1960) es un actor neozelandés de ascendencia maorí.

Temuera Derek Morrison (nascido em 26 de dezembro de 1960) é um ator neozelandês. Ele se tornou uma das estrelas mais famosas do país por seus papéis como o abusivo Jake "the Muss" Heke em Once Were Warriors e como o caçador de recompensas Jango Fett and the Clone Troopers na série Star Wars. Ele também dublou Boba Fett na edição especial de 2004 de Star Wars Episódio V: O Império Contra-Ataca.

Temuera Jack Nicolas David Morrison (ur. 26 grudnia 1960 w Rotorua) – nowozelandzki aktor filmowy, telewizyjny i głosowy, najbardziej znany z roli Jango Fetta i klonów w filmach z serii Gwiezdne Wojny. Użyczył również głosu Bobie Fettowi w nowej wersji filmu Gwiezdne Wojny: Imperium Kontratakuje, zastępując Jasona Wingreena (który użyczył głosu Bobie Fettowi w oryginalnej wersji filmu). Zasłynął też rolą Jake’a Heke’a w filmie Tylko instynkt, a także rolą doktora Hone’a Ropaty w operze mydlanej Shortland Street. Syn Hany (z domu Stafford) i Laurie Morrison, muzyka. Jego siostra Taini Morrison była artystką maoryską, a jego wujek Howard Leslie Morrison był wybitnym muzykiem estradowym.

Temuera Derek Morrison, généralement dit Temuera Morrison, est un acteur néo-Zélandais naturalisé américain, né le 26 décembre 1960 à Rotorua dans l'Île du Nord (Nouvelle-Zélande).

Il a reçu un succès critique après avoir interprété Jake Heke dans le film L'Âme des guerriers (1994) et sa suite What Becomes of the Broken Hearted? (1999).

Il connait une forte popularité mondiale après avoir interprété le chasseur de primes Jango Fett ainsi que les soldats clones dans les deux derniers volets de la prélogie Star Wars (2002-2005). Il reprendra le rôle de Jango Fett dans le jeu Bounty Hunter (2002) ainsi que celui du soldat clone Delta 38, dit « Boss », dans le jeu Republic Commando (2005). Pour la ressortie de L'Empire contre-attaque (1980) en 2004, il double les scènes de Boba Fett, interprété à l'époque par Jason Wingreen, avant de l'interpréter physiquement dans un premier temps en tant que personnage secondaire dans la série The Mandalorian (2020), puis dans sa propre série The Book of Boba Fett (2021-).

Il a également prêté sa voix au Chef Tui dans le film d'animation Moana (2016) et a interprété le père d'Arthur Curry / Aquaman dans le film Aquaman (2018).

Temuera Derek Morrison MNZM (Rotorua, 1960. december 26. –) új-zélandi színész, aki először dr. Hone Ropataként vált ismertté az új-zélandi Shortland Street szappanopera szereplőjeként. Akkor kapott már kritikai figyelmet, mikor Jake "The Muss" Heke-et alakította az 1994-es Once Were Warriors filmben illetve az 1999-es What Becomes of the Broken Hearted? című folytatásában.

Nemzetközileg akkor vált igazán híressé, mikor A klónok támadásában (2002) Jango Fettet, illetve a A Sith-ek bosszújában (2005) klónkatonákat alakított. Ismert szerepe még, mikor a hangját adta a Vaiana (2016) címszereplőjének apjához, Tui főnökhöz, illetve a 2018-as Aquamanban Aquaman édesapja, Thomas.
Ο Τεμουέρα Μόρισον (Temuera Morrison) είναι ένας Νεοζηλανδός ηθοποιός που κέρδισε για πρώτη φορά την αναγνώριση στη χώρα του παίζοντας τον Δρ Χουν Ροπάτα στη σαπουνόπερα Shortland Street.
data.name: Τεμουέρα Μόρισον

data.biography:
Temuera Jack Nicolas David Morrison, 26 Aralık 1960 tarihinde Rotorua, Yeni Zelanda'da dünyaya gelmiştir. Te Arawa ve Tainui kabilelerine mensup Māori kökenli bir ailenin çocuğu olan Morrison, sahne sanatlarıyla iç içe bir ortamda büyüdü. Babası ve amcası ünlü müzisyenlerdi ve kendisi de gençliğinde geleneksel Māori dansı olan kapa haka gruplarında performans sergiledi. Oyunculuk kariyerine henüz 12 yaşındayken "Rangi's Catch" (1973) filmiyle adım attı. Ancak profesyonel anlamda ilk büyük çıkışını, Yeni Zelanda'nın en uzun soluklu ve popüler pembe dizisi "Shortland Street"te (1992-1995) canlandırdığı Dr. Hone Ropata karakteriyle yaptı. Bu rol, onu ülkesinde bir halk kahramanı haline getirdi.

Morrison'ın kariyerindeki en belirleyici an ve onu uluslararası sinema çevrelerinde saygın bir oyuncu konumuna taşıyan performans, 1994 yapımı "Bir Zamanlar Savaşçıydılar" (Once Were Warriors) filmindeki Jake "The Muss" Heke rolü oldu. Alkolik ve şiddet eğilimli bir babayı canlandırdığı bu sarsıcı performans, eleştirmenler tarafından övgüyle karşılandı ve Yeni Zelanda sinemasının en ikonik karakterlerinden biri olarak tarihe geçti. Rolünü 1999 yapımı devam filmi "What Becomes of the Broken Hearted?"da tekrarladı ve En İyi Erkek Oyuncu dalında Yeni Zelanda Film Ödülü'nü kazandı.

Hollywood'un dikkatini çeken Morrison, 1990'ların sonunda "Hız Tuzağı 2" (Speed 2: Cruise Control) (1997) ve Harrison Ford ile "Altı Gün Yedi Gece" (Six Days, Seven Nights) (1998) gibi yapımlarda rol aldı. 2000 yılında, bu biyografi serisindeki diğer oyuncularla (Chris O'Donnell, Bill Paxton vb.) birlikte rol aldığı yüksek bütçeli aksiyon filmi "Dikey Limit"te (Vertical Limit), Pakistan ordusundan Binbaşı Rasul karakterini canlandırdı.

Ancak Temuera Morrison'ı modern popüler kültürün en tanınan yüzlerinden biri yapan proje, George Lucas'ın "Yıldız Savaşları" (Star Wars) evrenine girişi oldu. "Yıldız Savaşları: Bölüm II - Klonların Saldırısı" (2002) filminde ödül avcısı Jango Fett'i canlandırdı. Ayrıca serideki tüm Klon Askerler (ve Bölüm III'teki Komutan Cody) için fiziksel model ve ses kaynağı oldu. Yıllar sonra bu evrene muhteşem bir dönüş yaparak, "The Mandalorian" (2020) dizisinde ve kendi solo dizisi "The Book of Boba Fett"te (2021) efsanevi ödül avcısı Boba Fett karakterine hayat verdi.

Bilimkurgu ve çizgi roman uyarlamalarının aranan ismi haline gelen aktör, DC Sinematik Evreni'nde "Aquaman" (2018) ve "The Flash" (2023) filmlerinde Arthur Curry'nin babası Thomas Curry rolünü üstlendi. "Green Lantern" (2011) filminde Abin Sur'u canlandırdı. Ayrıca Disney'in sevilen animasyonu "Moana"da (2016) Şef Tui karakterini seslendirerek farklı bir yeteneğini sergiledi. Kültürel mirasına bağlılığıyla bilinen Morrison, Yeni Zelanda televizyonlarında kendi şovlarını sunmuş ve Māori kültürünü tanıtan projelerde yer almıştır. 2009 yılında Kraliçe'nin Doğum Günü Onur Listesi'nde Yeni Zelanda Liyakat Nişanı'na (MNZM) layık görülmüştür.

Ence Bagus Hartono, A.Md., S.Sn. (born December 25, 1980), is an Indonesian actor, comedian, director, and producer. He began his career in the entertainment industry as an extra in several soap operas and television commercials.

In 2004, during his college break, Ence accepted an offer to appear as an extra in his first feature film, Brownies. He became more widely known after joining the comedy show Extravaganza as a regular cast member in 2007.

Throughout his career, Ence has played various roles in films, such as a street noodle vendor, police officer, security guard, driver, journalist, house servant, anti-corruption officer, and clown in the film Guru Ngaji, which earned him a nomination for Best Supporting Actor at the Citra Awards.

In 2018, Ence starred in eleven films, including Yo Wis Ben, Guru Ngaji, Partikelir, Reuni Z, Love Reborn, Insya Allah Sah 2, 22 Menit, Gila Lu Ndro!, and DOA (Doyok-Otoy-Ali Oncom).

Despite his frequent appearances in various films, Ence acknowledges that getting a leading role is not easy, especially with the presence of younger and more attractive actors. He once stated, "I will only be the lead actor in a film if I make the film myself."

In addition to his career in Indonesia, Ence also appeared in a Dutch film titled The East (De Oost), where he played a pimp who introduced the protagonist to a prostitute named Gita.

With his dedication to acting, Ence Bagus continues to be one of the most sought-after supporting actors in Indonesia.
data.name: Ence Bagus

data.biography: Kaleb Horn is a Canadian actor and musician known for guest starring as Timothy Nash in Chucky, and recurring as Nowhere in the Netflix comedy drama series Glamorous. He has also appeared in the A24 film Dream Scenario (2023) with Nicolas Cage, and staring as Adrian in Beards: A Coming Out Story (2016).
data.name: Kaleb Horn

data.biography:
【王乃训】

　　【性别】男

　　【生日】2004-2-6

　　【特长特点】表演 绘画 体育 钢琴

　　【培训经历】2009年至今在六一艺术团学习影视表演

　　【演出拍摄经历】

　　电影：

　　电影《冬日往事》拍摄饰演男一号豆豆

　　电影《天堂村的孩子们》拍摄饰演男一号小浩

　　电影《当小河流经沙漠时》男一号的童年沙飞

　　电视剧《全家福》饰演刨子

　　电视剧《少帅》拍摄饰演少年《张学成》

　　电视剧《灵魂摆渡》

data.overview: Một phụ nữ Mỹ gốc Hàn trẻ tuổi khao khát tìm hiểu sâu hơn về cội nguồn của mình, nhưng không hề hay biết rằng càng đào sâu vào quá khứ gia đình, cô càng vô tình đánh thức một lời nguyền chết chóc đã bị chôn vùi từ lâu.
